title: Trivalvaria carnosa
taxonomy: Trivalvaria carnosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the custard-apple family. This family consists of over 130 genera and 2,000 species. Trivalvaria carnosa is a part of the genus Trivalvaria, which is a small genus of flowering plants native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The classification of Trivalvaria carnosa reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Annonaceae family. Further classification includes its rank within the plant kingdom, kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Magnoliales.
